data.content: Implemented hierarchy state ordering by assigning unique effective ranks to gate evaluation states, eliminating collisions with shipment review and preserving deferred-child provenance. Added regression coverage for gate-parent/work-child blocking and rank expectations. Validation: make install-hooks, cargo test state_hierarchy -- --nocapture, make sanity (95.48% coverage). Branch: knots-8a97-parent-child-order.
